thatpart.
Last updated: June 2026

By using thatpart, you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the app.

What thatpart is

A community space for readers to share chapter-by-chapter reactions to books. It's free to use.

Your content

You own what you post. By posting a comment or reply, you give thatpart permission to display it to other users as part of the normal functioning of the app (e.g. on the chapter discussion page, in shareable image cards you generate yourself). You're responsible for what you post.

Acceptable use

  • Be respectful. Harassment, hate speech, and abusive language aren't allowed.
  • Don't spam or post content unrelated to the book/chapter being discussed.
  • Don't attempt to abuse, scrape, or overload the service.

We may remove content or restrict accounts that violate these rules.

No warranty

thatpart is provided "as is." We try to keep it running smoothly but can't guarantee uninterrupted availability or that book data (covers, descriptions, chapter counts) sourced from third parties like OpenLibrary is always accurate.

Changes

We may update these terms as the product evolves. Continued use after a change means you accept the updated terms.

Contact

Questions? Reach out at thebooktokstudio@protonmail.com.
